Bash("C:/Users/Aquib Khan/.conda/envs/fashion-ai/python.exe" -c "
import psycopg2
from psycopg2.extensions import ISOLATION_LEVEL_AUTOCOMMIT

conn = psycopg2.connect\(host=''127.0.0.1'', port=5432, user=''postgres'', password=''Kingkhan@postgresql''\)
conn.set_isolation_level\(ISOLATION_LEVEL_AUTOCOMMIT\)
cur = conn.cursor\(\)

# Create user
cur.execute\(""SELECT 1 FROM pg_roles WHERE rolname=''fashionuser''""\)
if not cur.fetchone\(\):
    cur.execute\(""CREATE USER fashionuser WITH PASSWORD ''fashionpass''""\)
    print\(''Created user: fashionuser''\)
else:
    cur.execute\(""ALTER USER fashionuser WITH PASSWORD ''fashionpass''""\)
    print\(''User fashionuser already exists - password updated''\)

# Create database
cur.execute\(""SELECT 1 FROM pg_database WHERE datname=''fashiondb''""\)
if not cur.fetchone\(\):
    cur.execute\(''CREATE DATABASE fashiondb OWNER fashionuser''\)
    print\(''Created database: fashiondb''\)
else:
    print\(''Database fashiondb already exists''\)

# Grant privileges
cur.execute\(''GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON DATABASE fashiondb TO fashionuser''\)
print\(''Granted privileges to fashionuser''\)

cur.close\(\)
conn.close\(\)
print\(''Done!''\)
")

Bash("C:/Users/Aquib Khan/.conda/envs/fashion-ai/python.exe" -c "
import psycopg2
from psycopg2.extensions import ISOLATION_LEVEL_AUTOCOMMIT

# Grant schema permissions as superuser
conn = psycopg2.connect\(host=''127.0.0.1'', port=5432, user=''postgres'', password=''Kingkhan@postgresql'', dbname=''fashiondb''\)
conn.set_isolation_level\(ISOLATION_LEVEL_AUTOCOMMIT\)
cur = conn.cursor\(\)
cur.execute\(''GRANT ALL ON SCHEMA public TO fashionuser''\)
cur.execute\(''GRANT CREATE ON SCHEMA public TO fashionuser''\)
print\(''Schema permissions granted''\)
cur.close\(\)
conn.close\(\)
")

Bash("/c/Users/Aquib Khan/.conda/envs/fashion-ai/python.exe" -c "
import numpy as np
from app.services.clip_service import clip_service
from app.services.search_engine import search_engine, FashionSearchEngine

clip_service.load_model\(\)
search_engine.load_index\(\)

# Get raw \(non-normalized\) results
emb = clip_service.encode_text\(''black leather handbag''\)
results = search_engine.search\(emb, k=30, min_similarity=0.0\)

print\(''=== RAW scores for black leather handbag ===''\)
for i, r in enumerate\(results[:30]\):
    cat = r.get\(''category'',''''\)
    print\(f''{i+1:2d}. {r[""similarity""]:.4f} | {r[""title""][:50]} | {cat}''\)
")

import numpy as np
from app.services.clip_service import clip_service
from app.services.search_engine import search_engine

clip_service.load_model\(\)
search_engine.load_index\(\)

# Simulate what search_by_text does

print\(''=== search_by_text results \(with normalization\) ===''\)
for i, r in enumerate\(results\):
    print\(f''{i+1}. {r[""similarity""]:.1%} | {r[""title""][:50]} | {r.get\(""category"",""""\)}''\)
")
